headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: PayPal's Venmo Stash Expansion: Will This Drive More Transactions?
summary: PYPL's Venmo expands Stash rewards, offering up to 5% cash back and adding top brands, aiming to boost daily spending and transaction growth.
